scripts.deploy: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal --default-toolchain stable --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && pnpm install && pnpm exec wasm-pack build --release wasm && rm -f wasm/pkg/.gitignore && cd web && pnpm install && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-wasm-modules pnpm run build
